narrative:
38 Ohio House district has 75,469 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 32.2%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 25.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.2% D−R vs +35.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
